calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-13-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sheldon Balman, Esq. for Executrix, Joyce Hellgren.

Mr. Balman explained to the court that payment was made after Decedent died and of the $1,330.00 fees paid to Mr. Jaffe, the Defendant's (WSFS) lawsuit, and the paid back has been satisfied. The Court inquired of the civil action related to the reverse mortgage litigation, and to have WSFS submit document showing that it has been satisfied.
After hearing from counsel and reviewed of the declaration in support of the Petition for settlement of first and final account, final distribution, matter is taken under submission.

Comm. Sue Kaplan, CSR: LaVena Ward #7077, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Bailiff: Deputy Gomez.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
